name: libdouble-conversion3
title: libdouble-conversion3
summary: routines to convert IEEE floats to and from strings
description:
routines to convert IEEE floats to and from strings
This library provides routines to convert IEEE single and double floats to and
from string representations. It offers at lot of flexibility with respect to
the conversion format: shortest, fixed, precision or exponential
representation; decimal, octal or hexadecimal basis; control over number of
digits, leading/trailing zeros and spaces.
.
The library consists of efficient conversion routines that have been
extracted from the V8 JavaScript engine. The code has been refactored
and improved so that it can be used more easily in other projects.
.
This package contains a shared version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdouble-conversion3 because routines to convert IEEE floats to and from strings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdouble-conversion3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdouble-conversion3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdouble-conversion3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
